title: Tylerrrr's Mod Folder
description: A small collection of 1.21.8 Hypixel Skyblock mods that largely replicate the 1.8.9 mods I used back in the day, for easy setup!
body:
A lightweight(ish) Hypixel Skyblock modpack designed to be easy to install and use for the 1.21 update, if you're too lazy to put together a modpack yourself. Includes most of the features used in Not Enough Updates and Skytils back from 1.8.9 as well as the standard suite of optimisation mods and the Furfsky resource pack to ensure a smooth, good-looking experience.

Used on Hellcastle & Tylerrrr streams!

<details>
<summary>Mod List</summary>
  
## Skyblock Specific Mods
- [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament) Spiritual Successor to NEU and requirement for custom item textures
- [Skyblocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblocker-liap) Huge selection of QoL mods for Skyblock
- [SkyBlock Profile Viewer](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyblock-profile-viewer) adds the /pv command to view people's profiles in game
- [Furfsky Reborn](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/furfsky-reborn) My resource pack

## Optimisation Mods
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) Memory Optimisations
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) Rendering speed improvements (fixes some FPS bugs with Skyblocker)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) Lighting improvements
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) Rendering speed improvements
 
## General Improvement Mods
- [Chat Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatanimation) Smoother looking chat animations
- [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/mod/cubes-without-borders) For Borderless Windowed
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory) Makes that chat history more!
- [Sodium Fullbright](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-fullbright) Fullbright
- [Sounds Be Gone!](https://modrinth.com/mod/soundsbegone) Disable annoying repetetive sounds
- [Tooltip Scroll](https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltip-scroll) Scroll through tooltips that take up the whole screen
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) Shader support
- [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) My preferred shaders

## Dependency Mods
- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin
](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) (for Skyblock item list)
</details>
